evidence.detail: Profile returned 'not_found' error - the Instagram account @stroke.limit does not exist
Facebook profile shows 0 followers, 0 likes, empty name and about section - no meaningful presence
Only meaningful social media presence is on TikTok with 20 posts and low view counts (282-4680 views per video)
Highest performing TikTok video has 4680 views, most videos under 1500 views - indicates very small reach
TikTok videos average 42 likes and 2.4 comments per 1285 views = 3.5% engagement rate, but with unknown follower count cannot validate audience size
TikTok profile data is empty - cannot determine follower count to assess influence scale or calculate proper engagement metrics
